blended.narrative: Sunshine Village is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.8 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,114 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 3.8" of snow, highs of 12°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
